UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ralph Dayan trustee of the Dayan Family Revocable is present.
Attorney Edward Singer Jr. appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lisa Jones is present.
Attorney Catherine Danielson representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of April 22, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
